summary: Iteration 31: Admin pricing toggle feature for Resume Builder tested and bug fixed. The pricing toggle now correctly controls AI button visibility - when pricing is disabled (default), AI buttons are visible; when enabled, AI buttons are hidden.

bug_fixed.description: Admin pricing toggle was using 'pricing_enabled' field but backend expected 'enabled' field
bug_fixed.fix: Changed state field from 'pricing_enabled' to 'enabled' to match backend API

passed_tests: GET /api/builder/resume-pricing returns correct JSON format (pricing_id, enabled, price, currency)
Resume Builder: AI Generate Summary button VISIBLE when pricing disabled
Resume Builder: AI Generate Bullets button VISIBLE when pricing disabled
Resume Builder: AI Suggest Skills button VISIBLE when pricing disabled
Admin Resume Builder: Pricing tab accessible
Admin Resume Builder: Pricing toggle visible and functional
Admin Resume Builder: Save Pricing button works
Resume Builder: AI buttons HIDDEN when pricing enabled
Admin Resume Builder: Pricing toggle correctly updates backend
critical_code_review_comments: ResumeBuilderPage.jsx: Pricing fetch logic correctly handles enabled=false and undefined cases (line 89)
AdminResumeBuilder.jsx: Fixed field name mismatch - now uses 'enabled' to match backend API
builder.py: GET /api/builder/resume-pricing returns correct default when no pricing exists
builder.py: PUT /api/builder/resume-pricing correctly updates pricing with upsert
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested the admin pricing toggle feature for Resume Builder. A bug was found and fixed where the admin page was using 'pricing_enabled' but the backend expected 'enabled'. The fix was applied to AdminResumeBuilder.jsx. All tests pass: when pricing is disabled (default), AI buttons (Generate Summary, Generate Bullets, AI Suggest Skills) are visible; when pricing is enabled via admin toggle, AI buttons are hidden. The /api/builder/resume-pricing endpoint returns correct format with enabled, price, currency, product_name, description fields.
